audience_key.description: Opaque digest bucket this channel receives, e.g. 'repo:PostHog/posthog'.

enabled.description: Whether this channel is included in the daily digest fan-out.

slack_channel_id.description: Slack channel ID to post the digest to, e.g. 'C012AB3CD'.

slack_channel_name.description: Human-readable Slack channel name, for display only.

slack_integration_id.description: ID of the team's Slack integration used to post the digest.
